beats.text: The fire snaps and settles. {prism} watches the embers a while, then looks to you. "Early days yet — the ladder ahead won't be gentle. How shall we spend the night?"

camp.prompt: How shall we spend the night?

choices.label: Share a hot meal
choices.outcome: You break bread together and let the warmth settle into your bones. You'll take the field fresh and steady.

choices.label: Drill your champion by firelight
choices.outcome: {prism} runs you through the forms until the motions are second nature. The lesson sticks for good.

choices.label: Recruit a wanderer to your banner
choices.outcome: A figure drawn by the firelight asks to march with you. Let's see who the road brings.

choices.label: Attune deeper to your Prism
choices.outcome: You sit with {prism} until a new facet opens. The Light pours a little wider — more to spend, every turn ahead.

beats.text: You're going after {rival}. Let me set you up before you march.

choices.label: Steel yourself for the rush
choices.outcome: Outlast the first wave and it's yours.

choices.label: Drill the killing edge
choices.outcome: All forward, no flinch. Now go hit them first and hit them hard.

choices.label: Recruit an ally to your banner
choices.outcome: One more blade for the fight ahead. Let's see who answers the call.
